data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the customer acquisition sources, specifically where bookings come from. While the linked use case mentions 'Top referrer: Instagram (28% of new customers)', it does not provide a comprehensive view of all customer acquisition sources or a detailed breakdown of bookings by source. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to fully satisfy the requirement for customer acquisition sources.
gaps: Insufficient data on all customer acquisition sources beyond the top referrer.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
